options.content: ${server}

targets.expr: topk(15, (sum by (name) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{server="$server", name!=""}[1m])) / ignoring(name, image) group_left() count(node_cpu_seconds_total{server="$server", mode="idle"})) * 100)
topk(15, (sum by (name) (container_memory_rss{server="$server", name!=""}) / on() group_left() machine_memory_bytes{server="$server"}) * 100)

panels.title: Network Traffic: Inbound vs Outbound (by Device)
